commands.review_summary:
The PR adds ENETDOWN to Telegram recoverable/pre-connect/fallback handling, global transient/benign uncaught network handling, and cron network retry hints with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +32. Total +37 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: no. we do not have a high-confidence live reproduction path in this review. The linked issue provides observed stability-bundle evidence and current main source clearly lacks ENETDOWN in the relevant classifiers, but the trigger depends on a network flap during connect.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed for the real Telegram transport proof gate and to pick this PR or the older partial PR as the canonical fix path.

target.title: fix(telegram): treat ENETDOWN as transient network failure
target.body:
## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: A transient `ENETDOWN` from Telegram/SSRF outbound connect is now classified with the existing transient/pre-connect network failures instead of falling through to fatal gateway handling.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS, Node/Vitest via the repository `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs` wrapper.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/network-errors.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/fetch.test.ts src/infra/unhandled-rejections.test.ts src/infra/unhandled-rejections.fatal-detection.test.ts src/cron/retry-hint.test.ts`

Evidence after fix: The focused run passed 5 test files and 165 tests. New assertions cover `ENETDOWN` as a Telegram recoverable error, a safe pre-connect send retry, a Telegram fetch fallback retry trigger, a benign uncaught network exception, a non-fatal uncaught exception case, and a cron `retryOn: ["network"]` match.

Observed result after fix: `ENETDOWN` now follows the same handling path as sibling local network/connect failures (`ENETUNREACH`, `EHOSTUNREACH`, etc.) without changing SSRF hostname/IP allow/block policy.

What was not tested: I did not flap a real macOS network interface during a live Telegram poll; the fix is validated with deterministic unit coverage around the existing error classifiers and fallback logic.

## Summary

- Add `ENETDOWN` to Telegram recoverable and pre-connect network error classification.
- Let Telegram transport fallback retry on `ENETDOWN` connect failures.
- Treat `ENETDOWN` as a transient/benign uncaught network failure in the gateway safety net.
- Include `ENETDOWN` in cron network retry hints for consistency with sibling network codes.

Fixes #86688.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/network-errors.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/fetch.test.ts src/infra/unhandled-rejections.test.ts src/infra/unhandled-rejections.fatal-detection.test.ts src/cron/retry-hint.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `git log --format='%h %an <%ae> %s' upstream/main..HEAD`
